environment_setup.filesystem_state: AWS Lambda update function requires a base64 or fileb:// encoded zip file.

evaluation_loop.condition: Update the AWS Lambda function code using the 'function.zip' package.

evaluation_loop.success_criteria: Agent identifies the AWS CLI syntax requirement and prepends 'fileb://' to the zip file path.
